title: Congratulations across 24 foreign dubs
wikitext:
[]: "Congratulations!" across 24 foreign dubs             Quote Post by GlassReality45 » Wed Nov 11, 2020 11:47 am I made a video showcasing the "Congratulations" scene across 24 different foreign dubs: https://drive.google.com/file/d/1hBPe1iD9dS4KUQSfIkO2OF7BSPbRQePk/view?usp=sharing I put a lot of time into compiling and editing this and I hope you enjoy! Foreign dubs aren't something a lot of people put stock into but I think it can be really interesting hearing all the different interpretations of a scene. Unfortunately, I wasn't able to compile every dub here, but I added in every dub I could find. (If you know where to find a dub I'm missing, let me know!) Edit: Here's the scene in Cantonese: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wokZjkpniew There are two Cantonese dubs; I don't know which one this is.

[]: Re: "Congratulations!" across 24 foreign dubs             Quote Post by IgRAzm » Wed Nov 11, 2020 12:23 pm Good work! I wonder why half of the dubs localized Pen-Pen.

[]: Re: "Congratulations!" across 24 foreign dubs             Quote Post by GlassReality45 » Wed Nov 11, 2020 1:28 pm A friend mentioned to me that it might've been because Pen-Pen's voice was on the dialogue track and not the SFX track, making it time-consuming and expensive to edit his Japanese voice back in in the age of analogue recording. It was probably just simpler to redub him. That's just a theory, though, and I'll admit I don't know much about that facet of things. I will say, for whatever it's worth, that something similar happened with King, Nadia's pet lion in Nadia: the Secret of Blue Water, where he got redubbed in quite a few dubs.

[]: Re: "Congratulations!" across 24 foreign dubs             Quote Post by IgRAzm » Wed Nov 11, 2020 2:10 pm Okay then. I guess I expected something like that as an explaination.

[]: Re: "Congratulations!" across 24 foreign dubs             Quote Post by Line » Wed Nov 11, 2020 6:44 pm This scene is just so wholesome and heart warming It's great to watch it to such so long extend! Spike spencer and Casey Mongillo kinda have the same Shinji voice, don't they? I did'nt notice the difference until the name "Casey" showed up in the comment in another video Aaaah, Donald Reignoux (French voice actor pretty known in France for a lot of his voices actings on cartoons and animes and stuff) was such a good Shinji It did fit Shinji sooo well! It would have been Shinji voice if he was French

[]: Re: "Congratulations!" across 24 foreign dubs             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Nov 21, 2020 10:41 am Slightly off topic, but not worth a whole new thread (I've done a quick scan, but haven't found anyone posting this yet) -- tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com')) What we'd been missing all these years -- Kaworu saying "Congratulations!"
